name: launchpad-toolkit
description: Methodology prototype laboratory for chimeranext Launchpad pillar — AI intake, cap table, co-founder matching, investor matching, demo day prep, stage tracker, plus a chimeranext-api-consumer agent that enriches skills with live chimeranext API data when endpoints are available and degrades gracefully when they are not. Dual-purpose: external CLI for founders without chimeranext + internal validation lab for productizing patterns into the chimeranext Launchpad product.
